meaning: n.(大学)院长,主持牧师,(基督教)教长n. 迪安 Dean(男子名)
examples: I have tremendous respect for Dean.
The University of Washington elected him dean in 1956.
She was dean of the University of Washington's Graduate School.
Clark, chairman Dean Hoyle and chief executive Nigel Clibbens all deny talking to the Premier League club.
The event was led by the Acting Dean of Bradford, the Reverend Canon Andrew Williams.
